# programs.hyprlock

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.hyprlock`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.hyprlock.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Hyprlock, Hyprland's GPU-accelerated lock screen utility. Note that PAM must be configured to enable hyprlock to perform authentication. The package installed through home-manager will *not* be able to unlock the session without this configuration. On NixOS, it can be enabled using: `nix security.pam.services.hyprlock = {}; ` |
| `programs.hyprlock.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra configuration lines to add to `~/.config/hypr/hyprlock.conf`. |
| `programs.hyprlock.importantPrefixes` | `list of string` | List of prefix of attributes to source at the top of the config. |
| `programs.hyprlock.package` | `null or package` | The hyprlock package to use. |
| `programs.hyprlock.settings` | `Hyprlock configuration value` | Hyprlock configuration written in Nix. Entries with the same key should be written as lists. Variables' and colors' names should be quoted. See <https://wiki.hypr.land/Hypr-Ecosystem/hyprlock/> for more examples. |
| `programs.hyprlock.sourceFirst` | `boolean` | Whether to enable putting source entries at the top of the configuration. |
